languages.text: "На ее стороне воля Бога-Императора. Чья еще поддержка ей нужна?"

traits.locale_text: [draft] Главное, на ее стороне Бог Император, других голосов и не нужно!

languages.text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"
languages.original_text: "На ее стороне воля Бога-Императора. Чья еще поддержка ей нужна?"

traits.locale_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"
"She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"
"She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

languages.text: “神皇的意志与她同在。她还需要别的支持吗？”
languages.original_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

traits.locale_text: “神皇的意志与她同在。她还需要别的支持吗？”

languages.text: « Elle peut compter sur la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu. De quel autre soutien aurait-elle besoin ? »
languages.original_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

traits.locale_text: « Elle peut compter sur la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu. De quel autre soutien aurait-elle besoin ? »

languages.text: «La voluntad del Dios Emperador está de su lado. ¿Qué más apoyos necesita?».
languages.original_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

traits.locale_text: «La voluntad del Dios Emperador está de su lado. ¿Qué más apoyos necesita?».

languages.text: "Onun yanında Tanrı İmparator'un iradesi var. Başka ne tür bir desteğe ihtiyacı var ki?"
languages.original_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

traits.locale_text: "Onun yanında Tanrı İmparator'un iradesi var. Başka ne tür bir desteğe ihtiyacı var ki?"

languages.text: "Sie hat den Willen des Gottimperators auf ihrer Seite. Welche Unterstützung braucht sie noch?"
languages.original_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

traits.locale_text: "Sie hat den Willen des Gottimperators auf ihrer Seite. Welche Unterstützung braucht sie noch?"

languages.text: 「彼女は神皇帝の意志を味方にしている。他に何が必要だ？」
languages.original_text: "She has the will of the God-Emperor on her side. What other support does she need?"

traits.locale_text: 「彼女は神皇帝の意志を味方にしている。他に何が必要だ？」
